r32_continue.notes: Target checkpoint was saved. Modal then preempted/restarted the function from step_007992, causing the controller to mark the subprocess failed after manual duplicate-stop. The checkpoint objective was still achieved.

r64_continue.notes: Completed normally and saved the target checkpoint.

r128_train_until_done.target_policy: train until r32 and r64 continuations finish
r128_train_until_done.notes: The r128 job reached and saved step_015000 before a Modal preemption. After the stop sentinel was written, Modal restarted the same function and exited cleanly at final_external_stop_step_000600. For evaluation, use step_015000 as the latest useful r128 checkpoint; the final_external_stop checkpoint is only proof of graceful stop after restart.

manual_interventions.reason: r32 had already saved step_023976, then Modal restarted the function after worker preemption
r32 and r64 final checkpoints were verified
prevent redundant B200 retraining after final checkpoint was already saved

evaluation_recommendation: Evaluate r128 at step_015000 first; optionally include step_007992 and step_010000 for rank-128 learning curve.
Do not treat final_external_stop_step_000600 as the latest trained r128 model.
